item.dc:creator: ObsessedWithAnimals

item.title: My nephew is missing around Monument, Colorado. Just trying to spread awareness.
item.description: He's been missing since this morning when he did not get on the school bus. I don't know anyone in the area, but I thought maybe some of you might. He's high functioning autistic and my brother is very concerned about him getting the meds that he needs. If any of you might have seen him please contact the local police department. 719-390-5555 https://www.kktv.com/2022/04/28/missing-14-year-old-boy-last-seen-wednesday-morning-monument-area-need-medication/ Update: thank you for your concern. I've been kind freaking out, but we just got confirmation that he is at the fire department. I'm so relieved. Again thank you all for spreading the word.
item.dc:creator: fightingwithmyself

item.title: When you see something like this, don't be afraid, don't call the firefighters or the police, don't move and don't kill them.

item.title: A FINAL WHISTLE
item.description: A FINAL WHISTLE To close the trial with a golden pin, Johnny Depp's lawyers showed an audio where Amber Heard tells Depp that no one will believe him because he is a man. "Tell the world Johnny, tell the world, I, Johnny Depp, a white man, I'm a victim of domestic violence and see who believes you, see how many people take your side." These were the words of Amber Heard. The lawyers then asked Johnny; and what did you say about it? He said yes I am. https://nypost.com/2022/04/27/johnny-depp-draws-courtroom-sketch-during-amber-heard-trial/
item.dc:creator: TheRainbowegoSweet007

item.title: Things Only People With Depression Understand
item.description:
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Hope this helped my fellow severe depression sufferers out there and helped those without depression understand how it feels, so that you can possibly help or get help for someone you know who is suffering from it. You aren’t alone out there and things can and will get better. Also, don’t be afraid to seek help from a psychologist/psychiatrist if you feel that you have depression. We all need help sometimes and there’s no shame in it.
item.dc:creator: TheSmoothSayer

item.title: Found baby raccoon update
item.description:
Found this baby in the middle of a very large dog park stuck in the mud, ice cold and unresponsive. Any wild animal's best chance at survival is with its mom and they should be left alone almost every time. Dog parks are not a place to leave frozen unresponsive orphans though.
4 hours later he was still ice cold. A vet 20 miles away said they'd take him. I made the drive and they said, oh, a raccoon, no. They can't take raccoons unless I want it euthanized. She said baby raccoons can't get rabies though and I should snuggle him. She was wrong. I spent the night worrying that Ive killed my family or doomed them to rabies shots
Kitten replacement formula not goat milk, not cat milk is the closest thing to ok but if they're dehydrated start with Pedialyte. His whiskers looked like presidential facial hair.
20 hours later he was up, about, and very talkative. Ive got him in an old hermit crab tank with an old fashioned sticky mat (these are no longer considered a good option. Tape on sticky mats are safer)
Pennsylvania has a rabies problem so no county in eastern Ohio can take Rabies Vector animals so I had to drive 1:40 hours deep into trump territory to this little haven in Upper Sandusky. I question all of my life choices along the way.
The young man who came and got Chester A Arthur was comforting and so sweet. I cried after he took him. Is only known CAA 24 hours but damn, what a sweetie http://wyhumane.org/
Burger King tax. The staff at the burger king on the way home left food across from the window so they could watch the kitties enjoy
item.dc:creator: mrsdowneyjr
